name: ERA-IX Route Server Frankfurt
notes:
A new era of peering!

The future of peering on internet exchanges is under pressure, due to ever-growing costs, high number of failures, and a "too corporate" culture. In mid-2022 two internet pioneers decided to bring a better and more cost-effective alternative, and we never looked back.

### Our mission
It is our mission to redefine peering, by offering an innovative and cost-effective IXP ecosystem. The current state of peering is not-so-great and in a headlock by large corporate IXP-operators.

### Our way
We are truly neutral, fully privately owned and funded. Powered by a new generation of internet pioneers, our goal is to offer transparent and enterprise-ready connectivity services with a human touch.

### About us
We are the new-generation connectivity partner, fully privately owned and funded. We have built a next-generation connectivity fabric across major datacenters in Amsterdam and Frankfurt. [Read more](https://www.eranium.io/about) about our initiative.

### Latest news
Connect now with 400G! Read more about it on our [blog here](https://www.eranium.io/blog/114/the-new-fabric-and-400g).
